시편 100:1.content: Shout for joy to Yahweh, all you lands!

시편 100:2.content: Serve Yahweh with gladness. Come before his presence with singing.

시편 100:3.content: Know that Yahweh, he is God. It is he who has made us, and we are his. We are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.

시편 100:4.content: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, and into his courts with praise. Give thanks to him, and bless his name.

시편 100:5.content: For Yahweh is good. His loving kindness endures forever, his faithfulness to all generations.
